attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.B2B_MESSAGE_ID USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), 
STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.MESSAGE_PRIORITY, TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.PARTNER_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.STATUS_DATE, STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ORDER_NUMBER,
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.SHIP_SET_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.DELIVERY_ID,
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.COUNTRY_EXP_IMP USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE,
		STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.STATUS_MET_DATE, TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.STATUS_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.CITY_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.COUNTRY_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.STATE_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.MASTER_AIRWAY_BILL USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.CARRIER_REFERENCE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.FLIGHT_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.NUMBER_OF_PIECES,
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.RECORD_STATUS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ERROR_MESSAGE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.CREATION_DATE,
		STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.CONCURRENT_PROGRAM_REQUEST USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ID,
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.RRN_EXISTS_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.DOMAIN_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.OTM_INTERFACE_STATUS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.RETRY_COUNT,
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.OTM_TRANSMISSION_ERRORS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.OTM_TRANSMISSION_NUMBER,
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.NOTIFIED_TO_CARRIER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.COUNTER_VALUE,
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.SEQUENCE_STATUS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE1 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE2 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE3 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE4 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE5 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE6 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE7 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE8 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE9 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE10 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE11 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE12 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE13 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE14 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ATTRIBUTE15 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.TRAIL_FILE_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.SOURCE_DML_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
		STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM	
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I,
(
 select ORDER_NUMBER ,SHIP_SET_NUMBER ,ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE ,DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE ,STATUS_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME 
from	$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I
 minus
 select ORDER_NUMBER ,SHIP_SET_NUMBER ,ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE ,DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE ,STATUS_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME 
from	$$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_IFC
 ) ACM
 where 
 COALESCE(ACM.ORDER_NUMBER,-999) = COALESCE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ORDER_NUMBER,-999) and COALESCE(ACM.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,-999) = COALESCE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,-999) 
 and COALESCE(ACM.ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE,-999) = COALESCE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE,-999)
 and COALESCE(ACM.DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE,-999) = COALESCE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE,-999) 
 and COALESCE(ACM.STATUS_CODE,-999) = COALESCE(STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.STATUS_CODE,-999)
	and	ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_I.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B3_SHPST_HDR_IFC)
